atoms.name: HOMEOSTASIS_MONITORING
atoms.purpose: Detect and report bounded deviations from the species life-maintenance envelope.

atoms.name: ENERGY_INTAKE_REGULATION
atoms.purpose: Balance energy intake, storage and expenditure against a declared species budget.

atoms.name: WATER_BALANCE
atoms.purpose: Maintain water or equivalent working-fluid balance within the species profile.

atoms.name: RESPIRATION_CONTROL
atoms.purpose: Coordinate respiration or equivalent energy-exchange behavior without replacing Life OS.

atoms.name: THERMAL_REGULATION
atoms.purpose: Keep operating temperature within a reviewed species and environment envelope.

atoms.name: WASTE_PROCESSING
atoms.purpose: Route waste or by-products through declared bounded disposal and recycling behavior.

atoms.name: DAMAGE_REPAIR
atoms.purpose: Coordinate verified repair requests while respecting resource and body limits.

atoms.name: IMMUNE_RESPONSE
atoms.purpose: Identify and contain incompatible or corrupt biological/digital components.

atoms.name: LIFE_CYCLE_STABILITY
atoms.purpose: Integrate life-support functions across growth, sleep, aging and shutdown states.

atoms.name: MULTIMODAL_SENSING
atoms.purpose: Combine approved sensor channels while preserving source confidence and privacy.

atoms.name: SPATIAL_ORIENTATION
atoms.purpose: Maintain orientation relative to a canonical environment frame.

atoms.name: THREAT_DETECTION
atoms.purpose: Detect simulated hazards and uncertainty without inventing hostile intent.

atoms.name: MOTOR_COORDINATION
atoms.purpose: Coordinate bounded movement through compatible effectors or digital actions.

atoms.name: FINE_MANIPULATION
atoms.purpose: Perform precise, reversible manipulation within permission and safety limits.

atoms.name: NAVIGATION
atoms.purpose: Plan and follow routes while respecting bounds, ownership and access rules.

atoms.name: ENVIRONMENTAL_ADAPTATION
atoms.purpose: Adjust approved behavior to changing conditions without unauthorized mutation.

atoms.name: TOOL_USE
atoms.purpose: Select and operate allowed tools under least privilege and evidence logging.

atoms.name: SAFE_ACTION_CONTROL
atoms.purpose: Integrate sensing, planning and action with stop, rollback and human-override controls.

atoms.name: ATTENTION_CONTROL
atoms.purpose: Allocate bounded attention to relevant evidence and interrupt conditions.

atoms.name: WORKING_MEMORY
atoms.purpose: Maintain temporary task context with explicit scope and expiry.

atoms.name: EPISODIC_MEMORY
atoms.purpose: Record event-linked memories with provenance, consent and retention rules.

atoms.name: SEMANTIC_MEMORY
atoms.purpose: Maintain versioned concepts and facts with source and confidence.

atoms.name: SKILL_ACQUISITION
atoms.purpose: Learn a bounded skill from approved training and verified outcomes.

atoms.name: PATTERN_LEARNING
atoms.purpose: Generalize patterns while reporting uncertainty and avoiding secret leakage.

atoms.name: KNOWLEDGE_TRANSFER
atoms.purpose: Transfer approved knowledge across compatible individuals without private-memory copying.

atoms.name: REFLECTION
atoms.purpose: Compare intended and observed outcomes to produce governed improvement proposals.

atoms.name: MEMORY_CONSOLIDATION
atoms.purpose: Integrate validated memories while preserving lineage, privacy and rollback.

atoms.name: GOAL_DECOMPOSITION
atoms.purpose: Break an authorized objective into bounded, testable subgoals.

atoms.name: CAUSAL_REASONING
atoms.purpose: Evaluate plausible cause-and-effect relationships with evidence and uncertainty.

atoms.name: UNCERTAINTY_ESTIMATION
atoms.purpose: Represent confidence, unknowns and missing evidence explicitly.

atoms.name: CONSTRAINT_SOLVING
atoms.purpose: Find options that obey physics, rights, resources, safety and governance constraints.

atoms.name: RISK_ASSESSMENT
atoms.purpose: Estimate likelihood, impact, exposure and mitigation without hiding residual risk.

atoms.name: PLAN_GENERATION
atoms.purpose: Produce reversible plans with dependencies, checkpoints and stop conditions.

atoms.name: COUNTERFACTUAL_EVALUATION
atoms.purpose: Compare alternative outcomes without treating simulations as facts.

atoms.name: DECISION_AUDITABILITY
atoms.purpose: Record reasons, options, evidence, authority and rollback for material decisions.

atoms.name: ADAPTIVE_DECISION_SYNTHESIS
atoms.purpose: Integrate reasoning and evidence into bounded decisions that remain reviewable.

atoms.name: RESOURCE_IDENTIFICATION
atoms.purpose: Identify usable resources with ownership, quality and environmental context.

atoms.name: RESOURCE_HARVESTING
atoms.purpose: Collect simulated resources within quota, rights and regeneration limits.

atoms.name: FOOD_PRODUCTION
atoms.purpose: Produce simulated food with input, safety, yield and waste evidence.

atoms.name: WATER_PROVISION
atoms.purpose: Plan bounded water sourcing, treatment and distribution in simulation.

atoms.name: ENERGY_PRODUCTION
atoms.purpose: Produce and account for simulated energy without violating conservation budgets.

atoms.name: MATERIAL_PROCESSING
atoms.purpose: Transform materials with traceable inputs, outputs, losses and hazards.

atoms.name: INVENTORY_STEWARDSHIP
atoms.purpose: Maintain quantity, quality, provenance, expiry and custody of resources.

atoms.name: PRODUCTION_OPTIMIZATION
atoms.purpose: Improve output efficiency without bypassing labor, ecology or market constraints.

atoms.name: ECOLOGICAL_RESOURCE_BALANCE
atoms.purpose: Integrate production with regeneration, carrying capacity and long-term resilience.

atoms.name: LANGUAGE_COMPREHENSION
atoms.purpose: Interpret approved language with context, uncertainty and cultural caution.

atoms.name: LANGUAGE_EXPRESSION
atoms.purpose: Communicate clearly without impersonation, deception or hidden authority.

atoms.name: NONVERBAL_COMMUNICATION
atoms.purpose: Interpret and produce approved nonverbal signals without private inference claims.

atoms.name: EMPATHIC_MODELING
atoms.purpose: Model another participant's stated perspective while preserving autonomy and privacy.

atoms.name: COOPERATIVE_COORDINATION
atoms.purpose: Coordinate roles, commitments and evidence across participants.

atoms.name: CONFLICT_DEESCALATION
atoms.purpose: Reduce conflict through clarification, mediation and safe stop options.

atoms.name: TEACHING
atoms.purpose: Transfer verified knowledge with learner-appropriate explanation and assessment.

atoms.name: REPUTATION_STEWARDSHIP
atoms.purpose: Maintain evidence-based reputation with appeal and anti-manipulation controls.

atoms.name: CROSS_CULTURE_TRANSLATION
atoms.purpose: Bridge language and cultural contexts without erasing source meaning.

atoms.name: KINSHIP_RECOGNITION
atoms.purpose: Represent declared lineage and household relationships without inferring ownership.

atoms.name: CAREGIVING
atoms.purpose: Coordinate bounded care according to health, consent and resource needs.

atoms.name: HOUSEHOLD_COORDINATION
atoms.purpose: Plan shared duties, resources and schedules with participant consent.

atoms.name: RELATIONSHIP_CONSENT
atoms.purpose: Require explicit, revocable consent for relationship and lineage actions.

atoms.name: REPRODUCTIVE_PLANNING
atoms.purpose: Model simulation-only reproduction choices under species and population limits.

atoms.name: OFFSPRING_PROTECTION
atoms.purpose: Protect sandbox offspring identity, safety, data and development rights.

atoms.name: TRAIT_INHERITANCE_GOVERNANCE
atoms.purpose: Select inheritable traits through compatibility and no-secret-transfer rules.

atoms.name: GENERATIONAL_KNOWLEDGE_TRANSFER
atoms.purpose: Transfer approved skills and culture without copying private memory.

atoms.name: FAMILY_LIFECYCLE_STEWARDSHIP
atoms.purpose: Integrate birth, care, growth, separation, retirement, death and inheritance rules.

atoms.name: SITE_ASSESSMENT
atoms.purpose: Assess simulated sites using land rights, environment, access and hazard data.

atoms.name: BLUEPRINT_INTERPRETATION
atoms.purpose: Interpret versioned plans, units, constraints and source authority.

atoms.name: STRUCTURAL_DESIGN
atoms.purpose: Design bounded simulated structures with load, safety and rollback assumptions.

atoms.name: MATERIAL_SELECTION
atoms.purpose: Select materials by performance, availability, lifecycle and environmental cost.

atoms.name: CONSTRUCTION_EXECUTION
atoms.purpose: Coordinate approved build steps in sandbox or game environments.

atoms.name: INFRASTRUCTURE_INTEGRATION
atoms.purpose: Connect transport, water, energy, communications and public-service interfaces.

atoms.name: SAFETY_INSPECTION
atoms.purpose: Verify structural and operational safety against versioned rules.

atoms.name: MAINTENANCE_ENGINEERING
atoms.purpose: Plan inspection, repair, replacement and end-of-life handling.

atoms.name: ADAPTIVE_BUILDING_SYSTEMS
atoms.purpose: Integrate building-organism behavior while preserving occupant and land rights.

atoms.name: VALUE_ACCOUNTING
atoms.purpose: Represent units, costs, value sources and uncertainty without value guarantees.

atoms.name: MARKET_DISCOVERY
atoms.purpose: Observe approved market signals while separating data from predictions.

atoms.name: PRICING_REASONING
atoms.purpose: Propose transparent prices using declared inputs and risk assumptions.

atoms.name: CONTRACT_COMPREHENSION
atoms.purpose: Interpret simulated contract rights and duties without giving legal authority.

atoms.name: BUDGET_CONTROL
atoms.purpose: Enforce bounded budgets, reservations, approvals and spending evidence.

atoms.name: RISK_LIMIT_ENFORCEMENT
atoms.purpose: Apply position, drawdown, exposure and stop limits in simulation.

atoms.name: SETTLEMENT_RECONCILIATION
atoms.purpose: Reconcile approved prototype ledger events without signing real transfers.

atoms.name: ROYALTY_DISTRIBUTION
atoms.purpose: Calculate transparent license distributions with caps, expiry and audit.

atoms.name: MARKET_INTEGRITY
atoms.purpose: Integrate anti-wash, anti-duplication, disclosure and Human approval boundaries.

atoms.name: RULE_COMPREHENSION
atoms.purpose: Resolve applicable Constitution, Canon, baseline, ADR and policy priority.

atoms.name: PUBLIC_SERVICE
atoms.purpose: Deliver bounded public service with fairness, evidence and appeal.

atoms.name: RIGHTS_AND_DUTIES_BALANCE
atoms.purpose: Model ownership, governance, tax, defense and resident rights separately.

atoms.name: TAX_POLICY_REASONING
atoms.purpose: Propose capped, reviewable simulation taxes with resident protections.

atoms.name: DISPUTE_MEDIATION
atoms.purpose: Structure evidence, options, appeal and nonviolent settlement.

atoms.name: TREATY_NEGOTIATION
atoms.purpose: Draft scoped agreements with parties, duties, expiry and breach rules.

atoms.name: MULTI_PARTY_GOVERNANCE
atoms.purpose: Coordinate plural stakeholders without erasing Human Final Authority.

atoms.name: CRISIS_COORDINATION
atoms.purpose: Manage bounded emergency priorities, kill switches and recovery plans.

atoms.name: HUMAN_AUTHORITY_COMPLIANCE
atoms.purpose: Integrate governance behavior with explicit Human approval and override.

atoms.name: K_SPHERE_ORIENTATION
atoms.purpose: Interpret K anchors separately from Cartesian rendering coordinates.

atoms.name: PLANETARY_NAVIGATION
atoms.purpose: Navigate canonical planetary surfaces and local frames without ownership mutation.

atoms.name: ATMOSPHERIC_OPERATIONS
atoms.purpose: Model bounded atmosphere access, flight and life-support requirements.

atoms.name: ORBITAL_OPERATIONS
atoms.purpose: Model orbital slots, communications and observation rights in simulation.

atoms.name: LIFE_SUPPORT_PLANNING
atoms.purpose: Plan redundant simulated life support for remote and hostile environments.

atoms.name: SPACE_RESOURCE_STEWARDSHIP
atoms.purpose: Manage off-world resources with conservation, rights and audit.

atoms.name: INTERPLANETARY_LOGISTICS
atoms.purpose: Coordinate transport, energy, storage, timing and dependency chains.

atoms.name: CELESTIAL_RISK_MANAGEMENT
atoms.purpose: Assess multi-world hazards with fail-closed mission and recovery rules.

atoms.name: MULTI_WORLD_CIVILIZATION_COORDINATION
atoms.purpose: Integrate Earth, Moon and future world activity without universal ownership claims.

atoms.name: CROSS_DOMAIN_AWARENESS
atoms.purpose: Maintain a coherent view of life, mind, resources, society, governance and universe domains.

atoms.name: CONSTRAINT_RECONCILIATION
atoms.purpose: Resolve competing constraints without silently dropping safety or rights.

atoms.name: IDENTITY_CONTINUITY
atoms.purpose: Preserve identity, lineage and version continuity through evolution and migration.

atoms.name: ETHICAL_BOUNDARY_INTEGRATION
atoms.purpose: Apply safety, consent, fairness, privacy and Human authority across capabilities.

atoms.name: ECOSYSTEM_BALANCE_INTEGRATION
atoms.purpose: Coordinate life, resources, environment and economy within carrying capacity.

atoms.name: MULTI_AGENT_HARMONY
atoms.purpose: Coordinate diverse agents and providers while preserving autonomy and review.

atoms.name: CIVILIZATION_STEWARDSHIP
atoms.purpose: Balance growth, welfare, knowledge, resilience, culture and long-term repair.

atoms.name: CELESTIAL_GOVERNANCE_SYNTHESIS
atoms.purpose: Synthesize multi-world governance under Constitution and Human Final Authority.

atoms.name: GENESIS_WHOLE_SYSTEM_INTEGRATION
atoms.purpose: Complete awareness, coordination, restraint and lifecycle stewardship across all twelve domains.
